name: Stanton and Worthy, LLC
description_short: Stanton and Worthy, LLC is a credit repair provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 4.6/5 with 51 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Stanton and Worthy, LLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. Carrying a 4.6/5.0 Google rating from 51 reviews, Stanton and Worthy, LLC has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Atlanta area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a attorney, Stanton and Worthy, LLC provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Stanton and Worthy, LLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering Stanton and Worthy, LLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
